stages.title: Daily Squad Stand-up � 2026-04-01
stages.agenda:
Daily weekday meeting for all agents to review squad setup improvements and discuss progress on agentic harness engineering.

1. What shipped since yesterday's meeting (Track A/B/C progress)?
2. Any blockers on current work items?
3. Review recent agentic harness engineering best practices � are there new Anthropic articles or model improvements that change our assumptions?
4. Propose 1 concrete improvement each agent wants to make to the squad harness this week.
5. Agree on today's priorities and any re-sequencing needed.

Output: a bulleted list of decisions made, action items with owners, and any updated priorities.
